channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Incomplete yellow lines, 15th April
item.description:
At the entrance to Festival Way there are incomplete yellow lines on the left, causing parking and therefore access issues to residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18a, Folly Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Along side the new cycle path between Newlands and the Skate park, non of the street lights are working and several are out on the opposite side of the road. Dark and dangerous, 15th April
item.description:
Between Newlands and the skate park adjacent to the new cycle path. Some street lights on the opposite side of the reaopd are also out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drains need clearing to enable falsh flodding to drain any quicker, 15th April
item.description:
Opposite 146 and 149 Brooklyn Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Brooklyn Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Button doesn't work for cyclists. Also doesn't seem to activate automatically., 15th April
item.description:
Cyclist crossing of commerce road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long deep hole - danger to motorcycle and cars., 15th April
item.description:
On A40 roundabout towards Gloucester
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 15th April
item.description:
Discarded temporary traffic sign
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 15th April
item.description:
Good afternoon FOR THE ATTENTION OF THE HIGHWAYS DEPARTMENT Please see attached letter/drawings. We work on behalf of Cornerstone and are instructed on tree lopping works that are required to enable effective operation of their Telecoms Network. There is an area of trees that are impacting the network and tree lopping was identified however we are aware that these trees are covered by a TPO so our recommendation is tree lopping NOT to go ahead. Outage can be arranged (see attached letter) if maintenance works to the trees are required. Let me know if you require any further information. I look forward to your response.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All Stoplines on junction require refreshing, 15th April
item.description:
Traffic Signal Junction TS-064 Kingsditch Lane, Centrum Business Park, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsditch Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: I reported this a number of weeks ago and nothing has been done about it…, 15th April
item.description:
As you come down the hill the drain is at the bottom of the hill on the left.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Mandarin Way, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
